summary: PH: Recruiter sees info message and cannot send email if the candidate changes their email
wiki:
h2. User story

*As a* recruiter
*I want* blocking with explanation when candidate email identity changes mid-thread
*So that* I do not send to wrong person (map sticky + transcript)

h2. Scenarios

h3. Scenario 1: Candidate email updated blocks new sends

*Given* an active thread
*When* candidate primary email changes per candidate record
*Then* I see info message and cannot send until I resolve addressing per policy

h3. Scenario 2: No false positive on display-only refresh

*Given* no actual email field change
*When* UI refreshes candidate data
*Then* I am not blocked incorrectly

h3. Scenario 3: Historical messages remain read-only

*Given* prior messages under old email
*When* I view history
*Then* I can read per retention rules but not reply if blocked

h2. Definition of Ready

||Criterion||Any blocking issues to being ready / Notes||
|We understand the value this work provides to customers and how it supports the product vision.| |
|We have clearly defined, understand, and agree on the Acceptance Criteria.| |
|We have no blocking open questions.| |
|There are no dependencies blocking completion.| |
|We agree on the Manual and Automation testing approach.| |
|We agree on the customer documentation impacts.| |
|We have relatively sized the Story.| |
|We can complete the Story according to our Workday Definition of Done in a sprint.| |
|We have documented our discussions and the key decision points.| |
|We have discussed toggles| |

h2. Notes

* Figma design: [2-Way Email Recruiting - MVP designs|https://www.figma.com/design/HpAOHGAeXBORpHnyhsCMja/2-Way-Email%5FRecruiting%5F12%5F2024?node-id=6913-20249&t=z4GjQzGKwojLlwJw-1]
* PRD: [2-Way Email PRD doc|https://docs.google.com/document/d/13JkI%5FkUlyz6JfLDuEfSyheLPZ6K-P%5FoMP9ZeoHcvG%5Fw/edit?usp=sharing]

summary: PH: Candidates opt-out of receiving emails
wiki:
h2. User story

*As a* recruiter / candidate
*I want* conversation to enter the opt-out in-between state
*So that* Recruiters cannot send new mail but conversation is not fully closed (transcript with DUB)

h2. Scenarios

h3. Scenario 1: Opt-out hides reply and add

*Given* candidate opts out
*When* I view the conversation
*Then* reply and add are hidden and I cannot send new messages

h3. Scenario 2: Not fully closed state

*Given* opt-out in-between state applies
*Then* conversation is not marked fully closed per transcript semantics

h3. Scenario 3: Re-opt-in restores send

*Given* candidate re-opts in per policy
*When* I refresh conversation state
*Then* reply/add return if business rules allow

h2. Definition of Ready

summary: PH: Recruiter can switch between tabs for candidate and agency comms
wiki:
h2. User story

*As a* recruiter
*I want* tabs to switch candidate vs agency email threads where applicable
*So that* I manage formal agency coordination (transcript: agency-heavy regions)

h2. Scenarios

h3. Scenario 1: Switch tabs preserves per-tab scroll where designed

*Given* both tabs visible
*When* I switch tabs
*Then* I see the correct thread for each relationship

h3. Scenario 2: Agency tab forbidden without entitlement

*Given* I lack agency entitlement
*When* I attempt agency tab
*Then* access is denied without exposing snippets

h3. Scenario 3: XSS in agency display name rejected

*Given* agency display name contains HTML
*When* I render tab label
*Then* content is escaped per security baseline

summary: PH: Agency cannot see recruiter conversation
wiki:
h2. User story

*As a* agency user
*I want* not to see recruiter-internal conversation artefacts outside my scope
*So that* Confidentiality matches enterprise recruiting practice (map sticky)

h2. Scenarios

h3. Scenario 1: Agency user thread list scoped

*Given* I am authenticated as an agency user
*When* I list threads
*Then* I only see threads intended for agency visibility

h3. Scenario 2: Direct object reference attack fails

*Given* I guess another thread id
*When* I request it
*Then* I receive 404 or 403 without content leak

h3. Scenario 3: Recruiter-only notes never in agency export

*Given* recruiter added internal-only metadata if any exists
*When* agency exports or views thread
*Then* internal-only metadata is absent

h2. Definition of Ready

summary: PH: Recruiter can see both closed and non-closed conversation in the same panel if one conversation is still active
wiki:
h2. User story

*As a* recruiter
*I want* mixed states in one panel when one thread remains active
*So that* I retain legal context without UI fragmentation (map sticky)

h2. Scenarios

h3. Scenario 1: One active allows send target selection

*Given* one active and one closed thread in panel
*When* I attempt send
*Then* send targets the active thread only

h3. Scenario 2: Mis-select prevented

*Given* UI could confuse target
*When* I send
*Then* explicit target confirmation or single active send path prevents mis-send

h3. Scenario 3: All closed shows M6/M7 combined messaging

*Given* all threads closed
*When* I view panel
*Then* I see info that conversation is closed and send is disabled

h2. Definition of Ready

summary: PH: Recruiter sees tags on messages showing updating state (sent, delivered etc.)
wiki:
h2. User story

*As a* recruiter
*I want* state chips for sent/delivered etc. where MVP supports
*So that* I trust pipeline state; read receipts called out as post-MVP in transcript

h2. Scenarios

h3. Scenario 1: Sent shows after acceptance by provider

*Given* send accepted
*When* I view row
*Then* I see sent tag per design

h3. Scenario 2: Delivered only when supported

*Given* provider exposes delivered without read-receipt MVP
*When* state advances
*Then* delivered chip appears per engineering contract

h3. Scenario 3: Failed send shows failure chip

*Given* send failed permanently
*When* I view row
*Then* I see failed state distinct from bounce
